payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial edge-cropped view of a dark brown, glossy wooden nightstand top with visible wood grain and a slight front overhang; small surface scuffs visible and a teal cushion rests near the upper-left—appears close to the camera (≈0.8 m).
